extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR won mountain sprint finish on Jebel Jais after UAE train with PLAPP launching final kilometer, holding off YATES and VLASOV despite GUERRERO's attack.
tactical_patterns: PLAPP Australian champion executed lead-out at barriers for UAE despite mountain finish, unusual domestique sprint train deployment uphill.
EGGHORM and RASTELLI two-man break on mountain stage reveals no GC teams willing to burn matches controlling early.
UAE extinguished every attack via POGACAR personally after domestiques exhausted, showing leader forced into defensive riding mode pre-finale.
GUERRERO attacked inside flamme rouge forcing POGACAR's hand rather than allowing tactical regrouping into pure sprint.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: dropped on Jebel Jais after third-place time trial previous day, showing recovery deficit from TT efforts
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: finished only two seconds down in mountain sprint despite pure TT physiology, unexpected climbing form
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: executed sprint lead-out on 9% gradient at 1500m to go, Australian champion showing versatile tactical range
rider_signals.GUERRERO Ruben: neutral: initiated decisive move inside flamme rouge but lacked finishing speed to hold off Pogacar group
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: top-ten time trial result as pure sprinter signals unusual stage race form depth
